Trigger.name: Narrates
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["narrates"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["narrates"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Narrates")

Trigger.name: Chats
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["chats"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["chats"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Chats")

Trigger.name: Tells
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["tells"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["tells"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Tells")

Trigger.name: Says
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["says"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["says"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Says")

Trigger.name: Yells
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["yells"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["yells"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Yells")

Trigger.name: Immortals
Trigger.script: if communications.configs.colors["immortals"] ~= "reset" then selectCaptureGroup(1) fg(communications.configs.colors["immortals"]) resetFormat() end communications:append("Misc")

Trigger.name: Rat and Raven Reports
Trigger.script:
selectCaptureGroup(1) communications:append("Misc")
local roomname = matches[4] local foundrooms = searchRoom(roomname, true, true)
if table.is_empty(foundrooms) then selectCaptureGroup(4) setLink(function() end, "No matches found!") elseif table.size(foundrooms) == 1 then for id, name in pairs(foundrooms) do selectCaptureGroup(4) setLink(function() centerview(id) end, "Click to center map on room.") end else selectCaptureGroup(4)
setLink(function() for id, name in spairs(foundrooms) do local zone = getRoomUserData(id, "zone") echoLink( f"Room ID: {id}, zone: {zone}\n", function() centerview(id) end, "Click to center map on room.", true ) end end, "Click to display rooms with matching name.")
end

Alias.name: Reset Configs
Alias.script: communications.configs = table.deepcopy(communications.default_configs) communications:echo("Communications configurations reset to default values.\n") communications:save_configs() communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Communications Window Border Color
Alias.script:
local key = matches[2] local color = matches[3]
if not color_table[color] then communications:echo(f"Color ({color}) not known.\n", false, true) return end
local old_color = communications.configs.window[key] communications:echo(f"Communications window ({key}) updated from (<{old_color}>{old_color}<reset>) to (<{color}>{color}<reset>).\n") communications.configs.window[key] = color communications:save_configs() communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Communications Window Fontsize Size
Alias.script:
local fontsize = tonumber(matches[2])
if fontsize < 1 then communications:echo("Font size must be a positive number.\n", false, true) return end
local old_fontsize = communications.configs.window.fontsize communications:echo(f"Communications window (fontsize) updated from ({old_fontsize}) to ({fontsize}).\n") communications.configs.window.fontsize = fontsize communications:save_configs() communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Communications Window w/h/x/y
Alias.script:
local key = matches[2] local val = tonumber(matches[3])
local container = communications.container
local values = { x = container.x, y = container.y, w = container.width, h = container.height }
if (key == "w" or key == "h") and val < 1 then communications:echo("width and height must be positive numbers (interpreted as a percentage of screen width).\n", false, true) return end
values[key] = f'{val}%' container:resize(values.w, values.h) container:move(values.x, values.y) communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Show/Hide Comms
Alias.script: communications.configs.window.visible = not communications.configs.window.visible communications:echo("Communications will now be " .. (communications.configs.window.visible and "shown.\n" or "hidden.\n")) communications:save_configs() communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Dock/Undock Comms
Alias.script: communications.configs.window.dock = not communications.configs.window.dock communications:echo("Communications will now be " .. (communications.configs.window.dock and "docked.\n" or "floating.\n")) communications:save_configs() communications:show_comms()

Alias.name: Comms Colors
Alias.script:
local key = matches[2]:lower() local new_color = matches[3] if communications.configs.colors[key] ~= nil then if color_table[new_color] or new_color == "reset" then local old_color = communications.configs.colors[key] communications:echo(f"Communications color for ({key}) changed from (<{old_color}>{old_color}<reset>) to (<{new_color}>{new_color}<reset>).
") communications.configs.colors[key] = new_color communications:save_configs() else communications:echo("Color not known.
", false, true) end else communications:echo(f"Communications window key ({key}) not known.
", false, true) end

Alias.name: Debug
Alias.script:
--syntax: comms debug
communications.configs.debug = not communications.configs.debug communications:echo("Communications debug set to: " .. (communications.configs.debug and "<green>on<reset>.\n" or "<red>off<reset>.\n")) communications:save_configs()

Script.name: communications initializations
communications:echo
Script.script:
function communications:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<dark_khaki>(<sienna>communications<dark_khaki>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.debug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: communications:save_configs
Script.script: function communications:save_configs() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local configs_path = f"{home}/communications.configs.lua" table.save(configs_path, self.configs or {}) end

Script.name: communications:set_configs
Script.script:
function communications:set_configs() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local configs_path = f"{home}/communications.configs.lua"
--table to be updated local configs = {}
--if config file exist on disk, load it in self:echo("Loading communications configurations.\n", true) if io.exists(configs_path) then table.load(configs_path, configs) end self:echo("Communications configurations loaded.\n", true)
--update defaults with configs on disk configs = table.update(self.default_configs, configs) --and update those with current configs self.configs = table.update(configs, self.configs or {}) --and save to disk communications:save_configs() end

Script.name: communications:sys_connection
Script.script:
function communications:sys_connection(event) self:set_configs() self:rebuild() self:show_comms() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysLoadEvent", "communications:sys_connection") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", "communications:sys_connection")

Script.name: communications:sys_disconnection
communications.click
Script.script: function communications.click(tab) local self = communications self[self.current_tab]:hide() self.current_tab = tab self[self.current_tab]:show() end

Script.name: communications:rebuild
communications:show_comms
Script.script:
function communications:show_comms() local configs = self.configs.window
local r, g, b = unpack(color_table[configs.border]) local border_color = f'rgba({r}, {g}, {b}, 100%)'
local style = [[ background-color: %s; border: 5px groove grey; ]] if not configs.widget then self.container.adjLabel:setStyleSheet(style:format(border_color)) end
self.current_tab = self.current_tab or self.tabs[1]
for _, ctype in pairs(self.tabs) do self[ctype]:setColor(configs.background) self[ctype]:setFontSize(configs.fontsize) self[ctype]:bg(configs.background) self[ctype]:fg(configs.foreground) end
if not configs.widget then --favor right docking > left > top if configs.dock then local x = self.container:get_x() local y = self.container:get_y() local w = self.container:get_width() local h = self.container:get_height() local main_w, main_h = getMainWindowSize()
if x + w > 0.9 * main_w then self.container:attachToBorder("right") elseif x < 0.1 * main_w then self.container:attachToBorder("left") elseif y < h then self.container:attachToBorder("top") end else self.container:attachToBorder("float") end else if configs.dock then self.container:enableAutoDock() else self.container:setDockPosition("floating") self.container:disableAutoDock() end end
--show or hide communications container if configs.visible then self.container:show() self[self.current_tab]:show() else self.container:hide() end end

Script.name: communications:append
communications:show_help
communications:reposition_comms
Script.script:
function communications:reposition_comms(event, containerName, width, height, x, y) if containerName ~= "communications.container" then return end self:show_comms() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("AdjustableContainerRepositionFinish", "communications:reposition_comms")

Script.name: communications:comms_installer_success
Script.script:
function communications:comms_installer_success(event, name) --if installed file is not the desired one if name ~= "communications" then return end self:show_help() self:sys_connection() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysInstallPackage", "communications:comms_installer_success")
